title: Resolve stdlib only from nested corelib submodule

source.subject: refactor: stdlib only from nested corelib submodule

body:
Refactors CLI/stdlib resolution so artifacts come **only** from the nested corelib submodule path.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`8fa00e9`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/8fa00e9)
- **Subject:** refactor: stdlib only from nested corelib submodule
- **Completed:** 2026-04-10

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.1 (Compiler foundation)
- **Workstream:** `corelib-packaging`
- **Deliverable:** `v01-corelib-submodule`

## Relation
Finalizes **v01-corelib-submodule** stdlib single-source policy.
